items.summary: Governance file existence and parseability are now validated before execution, and runtime config/rulebook loading fails closed instead of silently substituting defaults.
frozen_with_conditions is now treated as a successful freeze outcome for canonical promotion, machine result paths, telemetry success, and CLI exit semantics.
The learning step now fails closed on missing/invalid boxed context or invalid model output, and board execution no longer swallows extractRules failures.

review.json, run-postmortem.json, and cycle-postmortem.json now use a canonical audit envelope with provider/model/latency/fallback fields at the audit root, and postmortem artifact claims are mechanically checked.
The live board path now loads review runtime behavior from the shared review engine once at startup, and the local mirrored review-runtime module has been removed.
The local review-runtime mirror has been removed from the live path and from the reviewed implementation bundle; the board now uses the shared review engine module directly.
run-postmortem.json audit output now includes provider, model, latency_ms, fallback_used, and artifact_refs in the same machine envelope used by the other review artifacts.
The board now validates illegal leader verdict/material-work combinations, writes a bug report, records the override in rationale/diff summary, and forces a safe effective verdict.
Conditional freeze now promotes canonical artifacts and preserves machine-facing canonical paths in result.json while still writing a conditions manifest.
cycle-postmortem.json no longer self-certifies its own existence without verification; it is written once, checked, then rewritten with the verified presence flag.
